title: frontends/ilang/ilang_lexer.cc:912:35: warning: comparison of integers of different signs
body:
I am getting two warnings during the build process.

```
...
[ 13%] Building frontends/ilang/ilang_lexer.o
frontends/ilang/ilang_lexer.cc:912:35: warning: comparison of integers of different signs: 'int' and 'yy_size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') [-Wsign-compare]
                        for ( yyl = (yy_more_len); yyl < rtlil_frontend_ilang_yyleng; ++yyl )
                                                   ~~~ ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
frontends/ilang/ilang_lexer.cc:1926:17: warning: comparison of integers of different signs: 'int' and 'yy_size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') [-Wsign-compare]
        for ( i = 0; i < _yybytes_len; ++i )
                     ~ ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~
2 warnings generated.
[ 14%] Building frontends/ilang/ilang_frontend.o
[ 14%] Building frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.tab.cc
[ 14%] Building frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.tab.o
[ 14%] Building frontends/verilog/verilog_lexer.cc
[ 15%] Building frontends/verilog/verilog_lexer.o
frontends/verilog/verilog_lexer.cc:1363:35: warning: comparison of integers of different signs: 'int' and 'yy_size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') [-Wsign-compare]
                        for ( yyl = (yy_more_len); yyl < frontend_verilog_yyleng; ++yyl )
                                                   ~~~ ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
frontends/verilog/verilog_lexer.cc:2863:17: warning: comparison of integers of different signs: 'int' and 'yy_size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') [-Wsign-compare]
        for ( i = 0; i < _yybytes_len; ++i )
                     ~ ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~
2 warnings generated.
[ 16%] Building frontends/verilog/preproc.o
...
```
